headlines.title: 3 Consumer Stocks That Fall Short
headlines.description: Regarded as defensive investments, consumer staples stocks are generally safe bets in choppy markets. But they’re also double-edged swords as they often lag in booming conditions, and this pattern has persisted recently. Over the past six months, the industry has recorded a loss of 2.4%, disappointing since the S&P 500 climbed 6.2%.
